heading: Mungeranie vs Munno Para Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mungeranie, South Australia and Munno Para Downs, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mungeranie has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Munno Para Downs (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mungeranie or Munno Para Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mungeranie has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Munno Para Downs scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mungeranie scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Munno Para Downs scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mungeranie or Munno Para Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mungeranie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
